transcript_text:
Customer: My order hasn't arrived and it's been 10 days.
Agent: I'm really sorry for the delay, let me pull up your order right now. Can you share your order ID?
Customer: It's #A7231.
Agent: Thanks. I can see it's stuck at the warehouse. I'm escalating this to our logistics team and I'll personally follow up. You'll get an update by tomorrow 5 PM, and I'm also issuing a 10% goodwill credit for the inconvenience.
Customer: Thank you, that's helpful.

Hi, I wanted to check the status of my refund request from last week.

Hi Rohan, thanks for reaching out. I checked and your refund of Rs 2499 was processed on April 18 and should hit your account within 3-5 working days. Reference number is REF-88123. Let me know if you don't see it by April 25.

Thanks, got it.

Agent: Thank you for calling, this is Anita, how can I help?
Customer: My internet has been down for 2 days and no one is helping.
Agent: I'm sorry about that. Let me run a line check right now... I can see there's an outage in your area, ETA for restoration is 4 hours. I'll also credit you 2 days of rental. Is there anything else?
Customer: No, that's fine.

Customer: hey is this the right place to cancel my subscription
Agent: yeah go to settings and click cancel
Customer: ok thanks

Customer wrote: I've been charged twice for the same order, please refund.

Hi Neha, I can see the duplicate charge of Rs 1299 on April 20. I've initiated a refund which will reflect in 5-7 working days. I've also added a note to your account so our billing team monitors for any recurrence. Reference: REF-88456. Apologies for the trouble.

Customer: app is crashing every time I open it
Agent: try reinstalling
Customer: done, still crashing
Agent: idk then maybe wait for an update
